input_text: Gertrude is a cat. Frogs are small. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. An old nice grey elephant was strong. A man did have a car. The room was cleaned. The tree was cut by the farmer. Anna handed Mark a silver key. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Daniel journeyed to the office. Americans can not disappear. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. Nile is 10 meters long. The children playing in the garden laughed. John is glad. Sadly, Mary lost the letter. Wolves are afraid of mice. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. The rain continued. The dog chased by the boy escaped. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. Earth contains Europe. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. A chocolate cake fell. The city was destroyed. If John is glad, then Mike is not glad. Riga is not in Estonia. The stone was heavy. A coffee cup broke. The picture was painted by Leo. Apparently, Tom left early. Clinton defeated Dole. A village road was narrow. Is Mike glad?
